meaning: n.反抗,抵抗,抵抗力,阻力,电阻,阻抗
examples: The defenders put up a strong resistance.
Diamonds have extreme resistance to abrasion.
I had never encountered such resistance before.
Guille Franco sent a flick against an upright on the hour as Villarreal provided stubborn resistance.
Because of this resistance to change, many of the two-storey buildings are originals from the 1960s.
